description: Multi-provider embedding gateway and RAG indexing service.
notes: Provider `anthropic` is an alias for `voyage`: Anthropic has no first-party embeddings API and recommends Voyage AI.
Providers are opt-in: only those with credentials in the secret are registered.

routes.summary: List configured embedding + rerank providers, default models, and aliases.
Generate embeddings. Body: { provider, input[], model?, dimensions?, input_type? }.
Rerank documents against a query. Body: { provider, query, documents[], model?, top_n? }.
Embed documents and upsert into a Qdrant collection. Body: { collection, provider, documents[], model?, dimensions?, distance? }.
Embed a query and retrieve nearest neighbors. Body: { collection, provider, query, top_k?, model?, dimensions? }.
Delete points by id from a collection. Body: { collection, ids[] }.
